subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-04-10 in Budapest
subcodes.first_line: Had the Persians and the Ottomans not opposed one another, all these nations would now be under their control. Yet they fell into such grievous heedlessness
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایرانیان و ترکان اگر با هم مخالفت نمینمودند تا حال جمیع این ممالک در تحت اقتدار
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence
